description: The Clan dei Casalesi is one of the most powerful Camorra clans and criminal organizations in Italy. It was created by Antonio Bardellino and originated in the municipalities of San Cipriano d'Aversa and Casal di Principe in the second half of the 20th century. The clan is active in Spain, Switzerland, and Romania, involved in cocaine trafficking, prostitution, construction, and money laundering.

country_links.evidence_quote: Antonio Bardellino, che controllava il clan dalla sua base in Brasile.
country_links.context: The clan's former leader Antonio Bardellino controlled the clan from his base in Brazil.

country_links.evidence_quote: In Svizzera e Romania , invece, gestiscono la prostituzione , il traffico di droga , l' edilizia , centri benessere e il riciclaggio di denaro
country_links.context: The clan manages prostitution, drug trafficking, construction, wellness centers, and money laundering in Romania.

country_links.evidence_quote: In Spagna sono molto impegnati ad investire in immobili, aziende agricole, alberghi, ville, negozi di lusso e traffico di droga.
country_links.context: The clan invests in real estate, agricultural companies, hotels, luxury shops, and drug trafficking in Spain.

country_links.evidence_quote: In Svizzera e Romania , invece, gestiscono la prostituzione , il traffico di droga , l' edilizia , centri benessere e il riciclaggio di denaro
country_links.context: The clan manages prostitution, drug trafficking, construction, wellness centers, and money laundering in Switzerland.
